title: Structural Patterns
subtitle: Route by composition pressure — how objects connect

panels.heading: Decorator
bullets: Add logging, cache, retry at runtime

panels.heading: Proxy
bullets: Lazy init, auth gate, cache layer

panels.heading: Facade
bullets: Keep facade thin, not god service

panels.heading: Bridge
bullets: Two axes of change evolve independently

footer: All structural patterns put a layer between caller and target. The difference is WHY: translate, wrap, control, simplify, unify, or decouple.
